ConditionExpression: Same DefectTypeId AND Same PlantId AND Status IN (Resolved, Closed)
FloorScenario: 3 orange peel alerts in 30 days → NCR auto-created. Forces root cause investigation when quick-fixes aren't working.
3 temp excursions on same line in 60 days → CAPA. The process needs systemic correction.

ConditionExpression: Rework disposition count / total NCR count at PlantId > threshold
FloorScenario: If >15% of NCRs at a plant are rework dispositions in 90 days, creates a management review alert.

ActionConfig: Flag on plant dashboard + CQI-12 audit report
FloorScenario: Any monitoring frequency reversion gets flagged. No auto-escalation, but auditors will ask.
